languages.original_text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: "Немыслимо! Этот ксенос похитил реликвии всех трех великих династий Простора и до сих пор разгуливает на своих двоих? Мы окажем династиям Винтерскейл и Чорда неоценимую услугу, если вернем принадлежащие им святыни, Лорд-капитан!"
languages.translation_comment: found the belongings of all the Rogue Traders of Koronus in the Trazyn Museum (an exhibit with them)

languages.text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Немыслимо! Этот ксенос похитил реликвии всех трех великих династий Простора и до сих пор разгуливает на своих двоих? Мы окажем династиям Винтерскейл и Чорда неоценимую услугу, если вернем принадлежащие им святыни, Лорд-капитан!"

We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

"Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

"Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: 「ありえない！この異種族は、広大な宇宙の3つの偉大な王朝から遺物を盗み、まだ健全な四肢で歩き回っているのですか？彼らに帰属する遺物を返還すれば、ウィンタースケール家とコード家にとって非常に大きな恩恵になるでしょう、艦長！」
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: 「ありえない！この異種族は、広大な宇宙の3つの偉大な王朝から遺物を盗み、まだ健全な四肢で歩き回っているのですか？彼らに帰属する遺物を返還すれば、ウィンタースケール家とコード家にとって非常に大きな恩恵になるでしょう、艦長！」

languages.text: « C'est tout simplement impensable ! Ce xénos est toujours en liberté et en un seul morceau après avoir volé des reliques aux trois grandes dynasties des Étendues ? Nous rendrions un service inestimable aux maisons Winterscale et Chorda si nous leur rapportions les artefacts qui leur appartiennent, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: « C'est tout simplement impensable ! Ce xénos est toujours en liberté et en un seul morceau après avoir volé des reliques aux trois grandes dynasties des Étendues ? Nous rendrions un service inestimable aux maisons Winterscale et Chorda si nous leur rapportions les artefacts qui leur appartiennent, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »

languages.text: "Unfassbar! Dieser Xenos hat gestohlene Relikte aller drei großen Dynastien der Ausdehnung und spaziert immer noch mit intakten Gliedmaßen herum? Wir täten Haus Winterzunder und Haus Chorda einen enormen Gefallen, wenn wir ihre Relikte zurückbrächten, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Unfassbar! Dieser Xenos hat gestohlene Relikte aller drei großen Dynastien der Ausdehnung und spaziert immer noch mit intakten Gliedmaßen herum? Wir täten Haus Winterzunder und Haus Chorda einen enormen Gefallen, wenn wir ihre Relikte zurückbrächten, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: "İnanılmaz! Bu zeno, Enginlik'teki üç büyük hanedanlığın hepsinden yadigârlar çalmış ve hâlâ tüm uzuvları sağlam bir şekilde dolaşıyor mu? Yadigârları iade edersek Winterscale Hanesi'ne ve Chorda Hanesi'ne paha biçilmez bir iyilik yapmış oluruz Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "İnanılmaz! Bu zeno, Enginlik'teki üç büyük hanedanlığın hepsinden yadigârlar çalmış ve hâlâ tüm uzuvları sağlam bir şekilde dolaşıyor mu? Yadigârları iade edersek Winterscale Hanesi'ne ve Chorda Hanesi'ne paha biçilmez bir iyilik yapmış oluruz Lord Kaptan!"

languages.text: «¡Inconcebible! Este xenos ha robado reliquias de las tres grandes dinastías de la Extensión, ¿y nadie le ha arrancado brazos y piernas todavía? ¡Lord Capitán, nos granjearíamos el favor de la casa Winterscale y la casa Chorda si les devolviésemos estos artefactos!».
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Inconcebible! Este xenos ha robado reliquias de las tres grandes dinastías de la Extensión, ¿y nadie le ha arrancado brazos y piernas todavía? ¡Lord Capitán, nos granjearíamos el favor de la casa Winterscale y la casa Chorda si les devolviésemos estos artefactos!».

languages.text: “简直骇人听闻！这异形偷遍了扩区三大王朝的圣物，竟还安然无恙地到处溜达？舰长大人，如果我们把属于温特斯凯尔家族和库尔达家族的圣物归还，那可是卖了天大的人情给他们！”
languages.original_text: "Inconceivable! This xenos has stolen relics from all three of the great dynasties of the Expanse and is still walking around with all his limbs intact? We would be doing House Winterscale and House Chorda an invaluable favour if we returned the relics that belong to them, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: “简直骇人听闻！这异形偷遍了扩区三大王朝的圣物，竟还安然无恙地到处溜达？舰长大人，如果我们把属于温特斯凯尔家族和库尔达家族的圣物归还，那可是卖了天大的人情给他们！”
